nameMeanings.name: Rose
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Ostensibly from the vocabulary word denoting the flower (Latin rosa). However, the name was in use throughout the Middle Ages, long before any of the other girls' names derived from flowers, which are generally of 19th-century origin. In part it may refer to the flower as a symbol of the Virgin Mary, but it seems more likely that it also has a Germanic origin, probably as a short form of various girls' names based on hros ‘horse’ or hrōd ‘fame’. The Latinate form Rohesia is commonly found in documents of the Middle Ages. As well as being a name in its own right, it is currently used as a short form of Rosemary and, less often (because of their different pronunciation), of other names beginning Ros-, such as Rosalind and Rosamund .

en.lifeSummary: Rose Brandeston was born in 1360, in Whiston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Hugh De Brandeston. She had at least 2 sons and 4 daughters with Sir William de Montfort. She died in 1432, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Rose Brandeston est née en 1360, à Whiston, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Hugh De Brandeston. Elle a eu au moins 2 fils et 4 filles avec Sir William de Montfort. Elle est décédée en 1432, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Rose Brandeston wurde 1360 in Whiston, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Hugh De Brandeston geboren. Sie hatte mit Sir William de Montfort mindestens 2 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1432 im Alter von 72 Jahren in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Rose Brandeston è nata il nel 1360 nel Whiston, Northamptonshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Hugh De Brandeston. Lei avuto almeno 2 figli e 4 figlie con Sir William de Montfort. Morì nel 1432, nel Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Rose Brandestonは1360年にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアウィストンでHugh De Brandestonの娘として生まれた。彼女はSir William de Montfortとの間に少なくとも2人の息子と4人の娘をもうけた。彼女は1432年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Rose Brandeston(은)는 1360년 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 위스턴에서 Hugh De Brandeston의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 Sir William de Montfort(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1432년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Rose Brandeston родилась в 1360 г. в местности уистон, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали Hugh De Brandeston. У неё было по крайней мере 2 сына и 4 дочери от Sir William de Montfort. Она умерла в 1432 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.
